notFound.title: Project not found
notFound.description: The project you're looking for doesn't exist.

shared.brief: Clarifying the problem, the audience and the constraints before writing a single line of code — the brief keeps the whole team pointed at the same outcome.
shared.research: User interviews, competitive analysis and heuristic reviews surface the real jobs to be done and the biggest opportunities to differentiate the product.

step1.title: Discover
step1.description: Stakeholder interviews, benchmarks and information architecture.

step2.title: Design
step2.description: Wireframes, prototypes and a scalable design system in Figma.

step3.title: Deliver
step3.description: Front-end implementation, QA, hand-off and continuous improvement.

shared.result: The final product ships with measurable improvements to the metrics that mattered — usability scores, conversion and team velocity — and a design system the team can keep evolving.

financeDashboard.title: Finance Dashboard
financeDashboard.shortDescription: A financial management dashboard designed for small businesses.
financeDashboard.fullDescription: A comprehensive financial management dashboard tailored to small businesses, covering cash flow, invoicing and forecasting in a single, focused workspace.

travelApp.title: Travel Planner App
travelApp.shortDescription: Mobile-first app for planning multi-city trips with friends.
travelApp.fullDescription: A mobile-first travel planner that lets small groups build a shared itinerary, split expenses and keep every booking in one place.

brandSite.title: Brand Website
brandSite.shortDescription: An editorial brand site with a bold typographic system.
brandSite.fullDescription: A one-page brand website that leans on strong typography, tight grid and micro-interactions to communicate the studio's point of view.

taskManager.title: Task Manager
taskManager.shortDescription: Full-stack task manager with realtime collaboration.
taskManager.fullDescription: A collaborative task manager built end-to-end in React, Node.js and Postgres, with realtime updates and a keyboard-first UX.

portfolioCms.title: Portfolio CMS
portfolioCms.shortDescription: A lightweight CMS for design portfolios.
portfolioCms.fullDescription: A lightweight CMS that lets designers publish case studies without touching code, with typed content models and an editor optimized for long-form writing.

landingPage.title: Product Landing Page
landingPage.shortDescription: High-converting landing page for a SaaS launch.
landingPage.fullDescription: A high-converting landing page for a SaaS launch — clear value proposition, social proof and a conversion-tuned form, all responsive and accessible.
